docs.title: DeepThinkJo
docs.text:
Think Deeply. Engineer with Purpose.

Welcome — I’m DeepThinkJo (조승환), an aspiring AI Engineer & Researcher. This is my personal hub, where I organize my learning journey, deep thinking philosophy, and long-term engineering goals.

docs.title: 🧠 My Philosophy
docs.text:
Deep — Think — Engineer

Deep — Real understanding begins with depth. Depth gives clarity, motivation, and purpose in both study and engineering.

Think — AI is the engineering of intelligence. Good engineering starts with structured, deliberate thinking.

Engineer — Building systems requires more than implementation. It requires intention, reasoning, and long-term vision.

This philosophy shapes how I learn, write notes, and build everything in my ecosystem.

docs.title: 📚 Deep Notes
docs.text:
The core of my learning library. A bilingual, structured notebook covering:

  • Mathematics — Linear Algebra, Calculus, Probability & Statistics
  • Computer Science — Algorithms, Data Structures, Programming
  • Machine Learning & AI — Theory, Architectures, Foundations

Every note is written with the mindset of:

  • Understanding from first principles
  • Connecting concepts across domains
  • Preparing for future AI engineering work

→ Visit Deep Notes https://deepthinkjo.github.io/Deep_Notes/

docs.title: 👤 About Me
docs.text:
• Major: Software Engineering
  • Focus Areas: AI Engineering, Machine Learning, Applied Mathematics
  • Tools: Python, C, VSCode, Colab, Git, Notion
  • Core belief:

    “Think deeply, learn systematically, and build with intention.”

This site will grow as I continue learning and building. Thanks for visiting!
